solution: Occurs when accessing a null object. Add null checks before usage.
Ensure index is within valid array or list bounds.
Install the missing module using pip install <module_name>.
Check backend logs for unhandled exceptions.
Verify database server is running and network connectivity.
Check for missing colons, brackets, or incorrect indentation.
Increase heap size or optimize memory usage.
Check server URL, port, and network connectivity.
Verify the endpoint URL or resource path.
Check for null before accessing object
